behavior_summary: U8P_ANVIL::look is a minimal 'U8P_ANVIL::look' (examine) handler for the ANVIL object that displays a single short identification bark 'anvil ' to the player.
After emitting the bark the process yields/suspends, so the U8P_ANVIL::look interaction does not perform further logic, branching, or state changes.
No global flags, parameters, local state, menus, or external calls are used by this script — it is purely descriptive.
notable_control_flow: Entry via the engine's U8P_ANVIL::look/examine process (processType 0x0208) triggers U8P_ANVIL::look.
The function emits one player-facing bark line, then executes an explicit suspend which pauses/ends the U8P_ANVIL::look process.
open_questions: The bark text contains a trailing space ('anvil '). Is that intentional for concatenation with other text elsewhere, or simply an artifact of extraction?
Two 'Unknown' nodes appear in the original disassembly; their presence does not change behavior here but could indicate structural/no-op remnants from the compiler or decompiler.

main_function.name: U8P_ANVIL::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown when the player examines the ANVIL object; display the bark 'anvil ' and then suspend the process.
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player or relevant actor performs a 'U8P_ANVIL::look' (examine) action on the ANVIL object (engine U8P_ANVIL::look processType 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_ANVIL::look
function_map.role: U8P_ANVIL::look/examine handler that emits a single bark and suspends

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_ANVIL::look is a minimal 'U8P_ANVIL::look' (examine) handler for the ANVIL object that displays a single short identification bark 'anvil ' to the player.
